name: Indoor Bookshelf: Readerly Leisure
description: A bookshelf with a unique design that can easily accommodate books of various sizes. It is often found in Lightkeeper camps.\nFor the Ratniki, knowledge is a precious treasure, as a sliver of knowledge gained by chance may save one's life at a critical moment. Therefore, whenever they have spare time, many Ratniki flock to the bookshelf to absorb more wisdom while they rest between battles.
